prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall, Mira Ledgerfall (androgynous, senior cadre in navy cloak with gold trim, silver hair) stands at a wooden table holding a leather-bound ledger; she points decisively to a specific location on a large quest map spread out on the table. Ari Moonvale (feminine, frontline adventurer in leather armor and short cloak) leans in close, observing the map with a determined expression. Bright, polished anime aesthetic, bustling guild background, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Ari Moonvale places her hand over Mira Ledgerfall's on the map to steady it, and together they slide a heavy iron map marker to a new coordinate. Mira nods in approval, closing the ledger with a soft thud. Consistent character appearance and camera angle, no text, no watermark.
